## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview with Stevie Kim for a Product Operations & Innovation Strategist role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Stevie has extensive experience in product, engineering, and ML/AI, aligning well with growthx.ai's needs](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [growthx.ai operates as an AI-powered content agency, building internal tools and workflows to automate marketing tasks](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [The role involves strategy, product management, and potentially some hands-on work with AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Company is in rapid growth phase, balancing revenue generation with platform development and learning](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Topics

### Stevie's Background

  - [Started as UI developer, transitioned to full-stack Python development](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Worked at Apollo Education Group, combining marketing tech with data science](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [5.5 years at Algorithmia in various roles, including DevRel and product management](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Experience with MLOps at DataRobot post-acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Recent roles at Human Signal (data labeling) and Opaque Systems (confidential computing)](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)

### growthx.ai's Business Model and Technology

  - [Operates as an AI-powered content agency for enterprise clients](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Built internal framework on top of Temporal for distributed AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Created user interface for content team to manage AI-assisted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Developing a marketplace for task distribution and potential data labeling](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)

### Role Expectations and Challenges

  - [Help scale strategy sprint offerings and identify platform feature gaps](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=4114.0)
  - [Assist in capacity planning and workflow optimization](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=4117.0)
  - [Balance revenue growth with learning and platform development](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=4127.0)
  - [Manage the complexity of human-in-the-loop processes with AI automation](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=6000.0)

### Company Culture and Work Environment

  - [Fast-paced, with rapid growth from $0 to $7M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=4890.0)
  - [Emphasis on learning and adapting quickly to AI advancements](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=5315.0)
  - [Collaborative environment with technical and non-technical team members](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=4572.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Stevie to have follow-up conversations with Jason (Head of GTM) and potentially Marcel (co-founder)](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=6187.0)
  - [Daniel to connect Stevie with Jason via email](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=6284.0)
  - [Company to provide a decision by mid-next week, considering holiday schedules](https://fathom.video/share/SNGDMcSnWHCAa9ZYuzbSJNzaZssv8_sX?tab=summary&timestamp=6308.0)
